name: TrueFi
description: TrueFi (TRU) is a legacy Ethereum ERC-20 protocol/governance token associated with TrueFi, an uncollateralized lending and private-credit protocol now transitioning into Brila. Current Brila documentation describes BrilaRWA as formerly TrueFi, while forum proposals describe a TRU-to-BRLA migration and planned sunset of TRU governance.

_meta.notes: Current canonical docs redirect to Brila. Brila docs state BrilaRWA, formerly TrueFi, launched in November 2020 and originated more than $1.7bn in loans. Keep TRU as a legacy/transition record, not as a clean tokenized fund share.
